meta.title: FP Pattern Library
meta.desc: CRUCIBLE's persistent false-positive library. Known benign patterns are auto-suppressed during future scans. Each pattern includes a suppression rule and hit count.

sqlite.query: SELECT pattern_name, plane, suppression_rule, hits, added_date, description FROM fp_patterns ORDER BY hits DESC

compute.expr: '**' & $string($count(fetched_sources.fp_patterns)) & '** FP patterns  |  **' & $string($sum(fetched_sources.fp_patterns.hits)) & '** total suppressions  |  Top: ' & fetched_sources.fp_patterns[0].pattern_name & ' (' & $string(fetched_sources.fp_patterns[0].hits) & ' hits)'
